text:
Ichiban Kuji (一番くじ) is a character lottery operated by Banpresto with guaranteed prizes. Ichiban Kuji has collaborated with many different anime series and has had ten collaborations with Hunter × Hunter so far. The tenth collaboration, ZAOLDYECK FAMILY, is ongoing and the eleventh collaboration, GREED ISLAND ②, is expected to begin on August 29 th .

General Information

Tickets for Ichiban Kuji can be purchased either in person or online.
 
Ichiban Kuji used to be exclusive to Japan, but select lotteries are now releasing in other regions in Asia, Europe, the UK, Oceania, and Mexico.

Each lottery contains a variety of prizes listed in categories A through Z, with the more valuable prizes being in the higher categories. All items in Ichiban Kuji lotteries are exclusive and cannot be purchased separately on their site or in-store.

Near the end of 2011, Ichiban Kuji released a new special feature: its Last One Prize (ラストワン賞), where the person purchasing the last ticket for a particular lottery wins the sole Last One Prize of that lottery, making it incredibly rare.

Ichiban Kuji also has a Double Chance Campaign, where purchasers have a second chance to get the exclusive prize at no additional cost.

Lotteries and Prizes

Ichiban Kuji Hunter × Hunter

The first Ichiban Kuji collab with Hunter × Hunter, simply titled Ichiban Kuji Hunter × Hunter (一番くじ ハンター×ハンター), began in early July of 2012. Tickets originally retailed for 500円.

The collab focused on central characters from the Hunter Exam Arc, with the D Prize category being titled specifically after the Hunter Exam Arc. The Last One Prize of Hisoka was a repaint of the B Prize of Hisoka with a new head and expression.

 

Ichiban Kuji Hunter × Hunter: Scarlet Memories

Ichiban Kuji Hunter × Hunter: Scarlet Memories (一番くじ ハンター×ハンター ～緋色の追憶編～) was the second Ichiban Kuji collab with Hunter × Hunter, and released Early January 2013. Unlike the previous collab, for which tickets could be purchased at many different physical locations, in-person tickets for the Scarlet Memories collab could only be purchased at 7-Eleven for 500円.

This collab was centered around Kurapika and his Scarlet Eyes, as well as the earlier Hunter × Hunter arcs in general. The B Prize of Killua was seemingly a coloured version of his Double Chance Campaign figure from the previous lottery, although this is not specified in the item's description on the lottery page. The Chibi Kyun Character E Prizes from the lottery are also incredibly similar to the Chibi Kyun Character D Prizes from the previous lottery, with notable differences being that Kurapika's figure now has Scarlet Eyes, and Hisoka's figure now has his eyes open, with a more noticeable playing card to reflect his new Last One Prize. Although not shown on the images on the lottery's page, the pedestals that come with the Chibi Kyun Characters have lines from the series printed on them.

 

Ichiban Kuji V HUNTER×HUNTER: The LAST MISSION

Ichiban Kuji V HUNTER×HUNTER: The LAST MISSION (一番くじV HUNTER×HUNTER～The LAST MISSION～) was the third collaboration between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter x Hunter, and released in conjunction with the Hunter x Hunter movie Hunter × Hunter: The Last Mission. As it released alongside the movie, tickets for the lottery could also be purchased at movie theatres. The lottery tickets were originally priced at 300円.

This collab was the first and only Ichiban Kuji Hunter × Hunter collab to deviate from the standard A through Z prize categories, and instead had 1 st through 3 rd prize categories that released sequentially. The prizes in this lottery were centered around characters and scenes from the The Last Mission, however they mostly focused on characters that were both in the original series and the movie, as opposed to characters exclusive to the movie.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER DAY OF DEPARTURE

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER DAY OF DEPARTURE (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER DAY OF DEPARTURE) was the fourth Ichiban Kuji collab with Hunter × Hunter. Tickets were originally priced at 750円, making them the highest priced tickets out of any of the Hunter × Hunter collabs at the time of release, but it was also the collab with the most full-sized figure prizes up to this point.

This collab was centred mostly around the main five characters, with some products also depicting Hunter Exam Arc characters, similar to the first Ichiban Kuji Hunter × Hunter collab. However, unlike the first collab, this one also had some prizes related to the Phantom Troupe. The five figures available in this lottery were all MASTERLISE figures. In addition to the prizes being outlined on the Ichiban Kuji website, Bandai also released a video showing off the prizes.

This was also the first Ichiban Kuji Hunter × Hunter collab to have the same figure be used for the Last One Prize and the Double Chance Campaign.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER REVENGE OF SCARLET

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER REVENGE OF SCARLET (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER REVENGE OF SCARLET) was the fifth collab between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter × Hunter. Like the previous lottery, the tickets were priced at 750円.

Revenge of Scarlet centres around the Yorknew City arc, and was the first Ichiban Kuji collab to have extensive merch of the Phantom Troupe members. Like the previous collab, all of the figures that were available in this lottery were MASTERLISE figures. Also like the previous collab, the Last One Prize figure and the Double Chance Campaign figure were the same.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER GREED ISLAND

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER GREED ISLAND (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER GREED ISLAND) was the sixth collab between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter × Hunter. Unlike the previous lotteries, tickets for this collab were priced slightly higher than before at 780円. This was the first of two GREED ISLAND lotteries, with the second not releasing until almost two years later in 2026.

GREED ISLAND centred around the Greed Island arc, with some of the characters from the arc appearing in Ichiban Kuji here for the first time. Like the previous collab, all of the figures that were available in this lottery were MASTERLISE figures. Many of the prizes in this collab, outside of the MASTERLISE figures, were based on the Greed Island cards. Also like the previous two collabs, the Last One Prize figure and the Double Chance Campaign figure were the same.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER CHMERA ANT

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER CHMERA ANT (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER CHMERA ANT) was the seventh collab between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter × Hunter. The tickets were priced slightly higher than before at 790円.

CHMERA ANT was the first of two lotteries that Ichiban Kuji would do centering around the Chimera Ant arc, with most of the characters from the arc appearing in Ichiban Kuji for the first time. Like the previous collab, all of the figures that were available in this lottery were MASTERLISE figures. The Last One Prize figure and the Double Chance Campaign figure were the same.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER CHMERA ANT ➁

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER CHMERA ANT ➁ (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER CHMERA ANT ➁) was the eighth collab between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter × Hunter, released on August 29, 2025. This collab served as the second part of the previous collab, HUNTER×HUNTER CHMERA ANT, with all of the characters shown so far for this collab having appeared in some capacity already in the previous, although it would be the first time Meruem and Netero would get MASTERLISE figures. The tickets were priced the same as the previous collab, at 790円, and the collab had the same number of prize tiers as its predecessor.

Prizes A through F, as well as the Double Chance and Last One prizes, were all MASTERLISE figures. The Double Chance and Last One prize were the same.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER Cross the "X-Day"

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER Cross the "X-Day" (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER Cross the "X-Day") was the ninth collab between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter × Hunter, and released on November 22, 2025. This collab was based on the 13th Hunter Chairman Election arc. The tickets were priced the same as the previous few collabs, at 790円.

This was the first time that a handful of members of the Zoldyck Family, most notably Alluka and Nanika, and their staff, as well as many of the Zodiacs, ever appeared in an Ichiban Kuji collab. This was also the first Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER collab to have MASTERLISE PLUS figures as prizes.

Prizes A through F, as well as the Last One Prize and Double Chance Campaign, were all MASTERLISE figures. The figure for the Last One Prize and the Double Chance Campaign were the same.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER ZAOLDYECK FAMILY

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER ZAOLDYECK FAMILY (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER ZAOLDYECK FAMILY) is the tenth collab between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter × Hunter, and began on May 22 nd , 2026. This collab is themed around the Zoldyck Family and includes merchandise of the family and their staff (with only one exception). The tickets for this collab are have the highest price point out of any Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER collab thus far, at 850円 per ticket.

While most of the Zoldyck Family members and their staff have appeared in Ichiban Kuji collabs previously in some capacity, some are appearing in this collab for the very first time, most notably Silva Zoldyck.

This collab is the first in over a decade of Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER collabs to not have a MASTERLISE figure as the Prize A or the Double Chance Campaign. It is also the first time in over a decade that the Last One Prize and the Double Chance Campaign have different prizes from each other.

 

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER GREED ISLAND ②

Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER GREED ISLAND ② (一番くじ HUNTER×HUNTER GREED ISLAND ②) will be the eleventh collab between Ichiban Kuji and Hunter × Hunter, and is set to begin on August 29 th , 2026. This is the second collab to be themed around the Greed Island arc, releasing two years after the first Greed Island collab in 2024. The tickets for this collab are currently set to be 850円 per ticket.

Some of the prizes for the lottery have not yet been announced, with the main A prize not yet shown at all. There is also currently no details on the Double Chance prize (if there will be one at all), which likely means that the Double Chance prize and the A prize will be similar or the same, as Ichiban Kuji has done in the past. All of the current known prizes are MASTERLISE figures.

With this collab, Razor and Goreinu will be appearing in Ichiban Kuji for the very first time.

Trivia

Ichiban Kuji, up to and sometimes during 2024, seemed to have plans to be much more accessible in the States, with an entire US site created and an official Instagram account with listings for US retailers that would have Ichiban Kuji items. However, at some point in early 2025, the Ichiban Kuji US site was removed, and the US is no longer listed with country information on Ichiban Kuji's overseas page. https://1kuji.com/areas The official US Instagram has also not updated in over 2 years.
A version of the Ichiban Kuji US site from early 2025 can be found archived here, where it can be seen that Ichiban Kuji HUNTER×HUNTER REVENGE OF SCARLET might have had plans to become available in the US, or at least have its own American page details.
